personalInfo.name: Abdelmalek Labid
personalInfo.summary: DevOps & Cloud Native Engineer with a passion for automating the Code-to-Cloud lifecycle, building internal developer platforms, and ensuring secure, scalable infrastructure.

highlights: Dockerized legacy development environments to ensure 'Iso-prod' consistency, eliminating configuration drift issues.
Designed and optimized GitHub Actions workflows to automate testing, building, and security linting, reducing manual release efforts.
Managed server configurations and wrote Bash scripts to automate routine maintenance tasks and log monitoring.
Orchestrated the communication between Python AI microservices and the core platform using container networking best practices.

projects.name: Ork8stra - Kubernetes Developer Platform (IDP)
projects.description: An Internal Developer Platform automating the 'Code-to-Cloud' lifecycle on Kubernetes.
highlights: Built a custom K8s Controller using the Fabric8 Client to programmatically manage Deployments and Ingress, abstracting YAML complexity for developers.
Designed the system architecture to handle multi-tenant isolation, ensuring resource quotas and security policies were applied automatically.
Implemented a WebSocket pipeline to stream live container build logs and Pod health status from the cluster to the dashboard.

projects.name: Al Baraka Digital - DevSecOps
projects.description: Secure digital banking infrastructure with focus on Data Sovereignty and Identity Management.
highlights: Implemented centralized authentication using Keycloak (OAuth2/OIDC), enforcing strict Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) for sensitive data.
Designed the integration with AI risk engines to process financial data securely, adhering to data privacy best practices.
Decoupled the monolithic application into modular microservices, containerized via Docker for portable deployment across environments.

projects.name: RetailManager
projects.description: Developed a modern, high-performance desktop application for small businesses to efficiently manage invoices, inventory, and clients.
highlights: Architected and developed a high-performance desktop application leveraging a Go backend (Wails, GORM, SQLite) and a React/TypeScript frontend, communicating via a JavaScript bridge.
Implemented a comprehensive invoice management system, enabling professional PDF generation with auto-calculations (VAT, totals) and historical tracking.
Engineered real-time inventory control, featuring automatic stock deduction upon invoicing, low stock alerts, and soft deletion for data integrity.

projects.name: Vibe - Social Media Platform
projects.description: Vibe is a social media platform designed to foster meaningful connections between users. It allows users to search for others, send friend requests, and interact through posts, likes, and comments. With an interactive news feed, real-time notifications, and an intuitive UI, Vibe offers a seamless socializing experience while maintaining simplicity and efficiency.
highlights: Engineered a real-time notification system utilizing Pusher (WebSockets) to provide instant updates for friend requests and post interactions.
Developed a comprehensive post management system enabling users to create, edit, delete, and share text/image content, enhancing user interaction.
Implemented a dynamic news feed with infinite scrolling, efficiently displaying friend posts and improving user experience.

projects.name: Travigo Travel Website
projects.description: Developed a multi-page Travigo Travel website, migrating from a single-page site to enhance online presence, user experience, SEO, and mobile responsiveness.
highlights: Architected and developed a multi-page travel website, migrating from a single-page design to include dedicated sections for Tours, About Us, and Contact, enhancing content organization and user navigation.

Implemented comprehensive SEO best practices, including meta tag optimization, semantic heading structures, and alt attributes for images, significantly improving search engine visibility and web accessibility.

Engineered a fully responsive and mobile-optimized user interface, integrating CSS animations and intuitive navigation to deliver a professional, engaging, and seamless user experience across devices.

projects.name: Vibe Platform
projects.description: A social media platform designed to foster meaningful connections, enabling users to search, send friend requests, and interact through posts, likes, and comments with an interactive news feed and real-time notifications.
highlights: Developed a robust social networking platform featuring comprehensive friend management, content creation (text/images), and interaction capabilities including likes and comments.
Engineered an interactive news feed with real-time notifications for social interactions, leveraging WebSockets (Pusher) for immediate updates and enhanced user engagement.
Implemented advanced features such as infinite scrolling for a smoother feed experience and a hashtag system for efficient content categorization and discoverability.

projects.name: Ork8stra
projects.description: A Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS), like a "Heroku-lite," built from scratch. Ork8stra provides a web dashboard and a CLI for developers to deploy their applications from a Git repository or a pre-built container image. The platform automatically builds, containerizes, and deploys these apps to a Kubernetes cluster, while also providing live logging, metrics, and cost-control mechanisms.
highlights: Designed and built a full-stack Platform-as-a-Service (PaaS), enabling developers to deploy applications from Git repositories or container images to a Kubernetes cluster.

Engineered an automated `code -> build -> deploy -> monitor` workflow, handling application containerization, deployment to Kubernetes, real-time logging, and implementing cost-control mechanisms like app sleeping.

Developed a scalable architecture featuring a React UI, Spring Boot API, RabbitMQ for messaging, and a refactored microservice choreography for build/deploy processes, alongside a dedicated Prometheus/Grafana stack for platform monitoring.

projects.name: GhostWire
highlights: Developed a web-based application leveraging JavaScript, CSS, and HTML.
Implemented foundational front-end components for the GhostWire project.
Established a core project structure for web development.

projects.name: Project Donna
projects.description: Donna is a high-EQ, proactive AI assistant inspired by Donna Paulsen from Suits. She keeps you on track, roasts you when you slack, and celebrates (reluctantly) when you succeed.
highlights: Engineered a robust full-stack application with a Next.js 14 PWA frontend, FastAPI Python API backend, and a Supabase PostgreSQL database, utilizing pgvector for enhanced AI data handling.

Developed an AI-powered accountability partner, 'Donna', integrating Gemini 1.5 Flash for dynamic, high-EQ conversational responses and Google Calendar API for personalized task management and scheduling.
Designed and implemented a modern, responsive Progressive Web Application (PWA) frontend using Next.js 14, Shadcn/UI, and Tailwind CSS, providing an intuitive user experience.

projects.name: MEV Arbitrage Bot
projects.description: A high-frequency, production-ready MEV arbitrage bot that detects price discrepancies between Uniswap V3 and SushiSwap on Arbitrum One, uses Balancer Flash Loans (0% fees) for capital-free execution, and executes atomic arbitrage trades.
highlights: Developed a high-frequency MEV arbitrage bot leveraging Rust for off-chain monitoring and Solidity for on-chain atomic swaps.
Implemented a zero-loss architecture by simulating all transactions prior to execution and utilizing Balancer V2 flash loans for capital-free operations.
Engineered a backrunning strategy to detect and capitalize on price discrepancies between Uniswap V3 and SushiSwap on Arbitrum One.

projects.name: Clustered Data Warehouse
projects.description: A high-performance, containerized ETL ingestion service designed to validate and persist FX deals, built with a focus on idempotency, fault tolerance, and traceability.
highlights: Implemented an idempotent ingestion service with a robust duplicate check layer, ensuring data consistency and preventing corruption upon re-submission of FX deals.
Engineered a fault-tolerant ETL service supporting partial batch success, persisting valid deals immediately and isolating invalid ones without rolling back the entire batch.
Deployed a fully containerized service using Docker & Docker Compose for streamlined operations and managed database schema evolution with Liquibase for reproducible environments.

projects.name: LDP Project
highlights: Developed a web-based application leveraging modern front-end technologies.
Engineered containerization for the project using Docker, streamlining deployment workflows.
Managed project development, demonstrating proficiency in core web and deployment technologies.
